Motion To Compel Verified Further Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories, And To Document Production Requests; Req. For Sanctions (And Motion To Strike Improper Objections To Form And Special Interrogatories)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JONATHAN A. BRAUNSTEIN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, MAXON YOUNG ASSOCIATES, INC.
MICHAEL H. PORRAZZO, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK

RULING:
MATTER ARGUED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Verified Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Requests For Production of Documents; To Strike Improper Objections To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Requests For Production of Documents; and Request For Sanctions IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FULLY AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN TEN(10) DAYS. DOCUMENTS SHALL BE PRODUCED SUBJECT TO A PROTECTIVE ORDER. SUBMIT THE PROTECTIVE ORDER TO THE COURT FOR APPROVAL IF PARTIES ARE UNABLE TO AGREE ON THE FORM OF THE ORDER. SANCTIONS IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $925.00, TO BE PAID WITHIN THIRTY(30) DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (612/HEWLETT)
